creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-04-23 17:09:14 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-MouseX-ConfigFromFile Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                   pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This is an abstract role which provides an alternate constructor
  for creating objects using parameters passed in from a configuration file.
  The actual implementation of reading the configuration file is
  left to concrete subroles.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/MouseX-ConfigFromFile/
  
  PR:             ports/133914
  Submitted by:   TERAMOTO Masahiro <markun at onohara.to>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3468    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/devel/p5-MouseX-ConfigFromFile/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-MouseX-ConfigFromFile/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-MouseX-ConfigFromFile/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-MouseX-ConfigFromFile/pkg-plist (new)
